description: Deploy Expo apps to iOS App Store, Android Play Store, and web.

procedure.description:
[overview] # Expo Deployment

Deploy Expo apps to iOS App Store, Android Play Store, and web.

[When to Use] - Publishing to App Store / Play Store
- EAS Build configuration
- OTA updates
- CI/CD workflows for mobile
[Source] This skill references patterns from [Expo's skills](https://github.com/expo/skills).
